name: Wheat Leaf Rust (Brown Rust)
symptoms: small orange-brown pustules on upper leaf surface
leaves turn yellow and dry prematurely

severity_indicators.low: Few scattered pustules, <10% leaf area affected
severity_indicators.critical: Entire leaf covered, >70% area affected, premature drying

name: Wheat Yellow Rust (Stripe Rust)
symptoms: yellow-orange pustules in linear stripes along leaf veins
stripes run parallel to leaf length
favorable_conditions: Cool temperatures 10-15°C, high humidity, cloudy weather

severity_indicators.low: Few yellow stripes visible, <10% leaf area
severity_indicators.critical: Complete leaf yellowing, >60% area, spreading to head

name: Rice Blast
symptoms: lesions on nodes causing stem breakage
favorable_conditions: Temperature 25-28°C, high humidity >80%, excessive nitrogen fertilization

severity_indicators.high: Large dead areas on leaves, 25-50% affected
severity_indicators.critical: Neck blast, panicle death, >50% plant affected

name: Rice Bacterial Leaf Blight
symptoms: milky bacterial ooze on cut leaves
favorable_conditions: Temperature 25-34°C, heavy rains, flooding, high nitrogen

severity_indicators.low: Small lesions on leaf tips, <10% area

name: Cotton Bollworm (American Bollworm)
favorable_conditions: Warm temperature 25-35°C, dry weather, late sowing

severity_indicators.low: 1-2 larvae per plant, few boll holes

name: Cotton Whitefly
symptoms: small white flying insects under leaves
favorable_conditions: Hot dry weather >30°C, low humidity, excessive nitrogen

severity_indicators.high: Heavy population, sticky leaves, sooty mold
severity_indicators.critical: Severe infestation, leaf curl, plant decline

name: Tomato Late Blight
symptoms: water-soaked dark green/brown spots on leaves
white fuzzy growth on leaf undersides in humid conditions
favorable_conditions: Cool temperature 15-22°C, high humidity >90%, prolonged wet weather

name: Tomato Early Blight
symptoms: dark brown spots with concentric rings (target-like)
spots start on lower/older leaves first
dark sunken spots on fruit at stem end
favorable_conditions: Temperature 24-29°C, alternating wet-dry conditions, poor nutrition

severity_indicators.low: Few spots on lower leaves only, <10%

name: Sugarcane Red Rot
symptoms: red discoloration of internal cane tissue
favorable_conditions: Temperature 28-32°C, high moisture, waterlogging, using infected seed cane

severity_indicators.low: Slight internal reddening, plant appears normal externally
severity_indicators.medium: Clear internal red rot, some leaf drying

name: Mango Anthracnose
symptoms: flower blight (flowers turn black and drop)
favorable_conditions: Temperature 25-30°C, high humidity, rainfall during flowering

severity_indicators.low: Few leaf spots, flowers mostly healthy
severity_indicators.high: Severe flower blight, fruit spotting, 30-60% loss
severity_indicators.critical: Total flower destruction, severe fruit rot, >60% loss

name: Potato Late Blight
symptoms: water-soaked dark patches on leaf tips and edges
tuber rot (firm brown rot under skin)
favorable_conditions: Cool nights 10-15°C, humid days, prolonged wetness

name: Maize Stem Borer
symptoms: small holes in leaves (shot holes) from larval feeding
dead heart (central shoot dries and pulls out easily)

severity_indicators.low: Shot holes on leaves only, no dead heart
severity_indicators.high: 20-50% plants with dead heart or stem tunneling

name: Chickpea Fusarium Wilt
symptoms: drooping and wilting of whole plant
brown discoloration of vascular tissue when stem is cut
plant dries up but stays standing
favorable_conditions: Warm soil temperature 25-30°C, sandy soils, poor drainage

name: Nitrogen Deficiency
symptoms: older/lower leaves turn pale green then yellow
favorable_conditions: Sandy soils, heavy rainfall (leaching), insufficient fertilization, waterlogging

severity_indicators.low: Slight pale green color on older leaves
severity_indicators.medium: Clear yellowing of lower leaves, slight growth reduction
severity_indicators.high: Yellowing spreading to upper leaves, noticeable stunting
severity_indicators.critical: Entire plant yellow, severely stunted, leaf death

name: Potassium Deficiency
symptoms: leaf margins (edges) turn brown and scorched
favorable_conditions: Sandy soils, heavy leaching, continuous cropping without potash fertilizer

severity_indicators.low: Slight marginal browning on oldest leaves
severity_indicators.medium: Clear scorching on multiple lower leaves
severity_indicators.critical: Severe scorch, plant decline, crop failure risk
